head_commit.message:
Fix compilation on `armv7a-none-eabihf` by making `aarch64-cpu` a target-conditional dependency (#20)

* Initial plan

* Fix compilation on armv7a by making aarch64-cpu a target-conditional dependency

Co-authored-by: ZR233 <34859362+ZR233@users.noreply.github.com>

* CI: add armv7a-none-eabihf compile test to matrix

Co-authored-by: ZR233 <34859362+ZR233@users.noreply.github.com>

* CI: skip clippy for armv7a-none-eabihf, build only

Co-authored-by: ZR233 <34859362+ZR233@users.noreply.github.com>

* CI: use cargo build -p arm-gic-driver for armv7a target

Co-authored-by: ZR233 <34859362+ZR233@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix armv7a build: gate v3 rdif impls with cfg(target_arch = "aarch64")

Co-authored-by: ZR233 <34859362+ZR233@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: ZR233 <34859362+ZR233@users.noreply.github.com>
